ham: Aapka vetan ₹75,000 aapke khata 1234567890 mein jama ho gaya hai. App se check kare. Agar unauthorized transaction ho to 1800-123-456 par call kare.
spam: Hey! Congrats, aapko remote job mil gaya on WhatsApp. Earn ₹5000 per day, no experience required. Click <URL> to apply. Urgnt, limited slots availble! Dhanyawad!
